use_cases: E-commerce product filtering by minimum and maximum price thresholds
Real estate property search by budget range selection
Financial applications for investment or loan amount range input
SaaS pricing tier configuration with custom value ranges
Any dual-value numeric range selection requiring formatted output
ai_summary: A dual-thumb price range slider component for selecting minimum and maximum price values within a configurable range. Features formatted currency display, drag-based thumb manipulation, and supports both mouse and touch interactions for cross-platform use. Includes callback hooks for value change events and customizable min/max/step parameters.
